These conditions select Eternity, non-Eternity, early-bird, segmented-boss, or surviving-twin loot branches; the defeated source remains the progression gate.
Runtime supporter conditions enable optional Patreon items but do not add a later progression milestone; the enemy or boss source determines availability.
Hardmode begins after Wall of Flesh.
A pre-Hardmode restriction does not require a defeated boss.
The official availability guide places Meteor Enchantment after the world-evil boss.
The vendor's own arrival stage remains authoritative; holding a matching weapon does not create a boss milestone.
The shop entry opens after the Celestial Pillars, represented by the Lunatic Cultist stage in this profile.
The official recipe requires Luminite Bars and the Ancient Manipulator, so the station is available after Moon Lord.
Deviating Energy drops from Deviantt and its treasure bag.
Abomination Energy drops from Abominationn and its treasure bag.
Eternal Energy drops from Mutant's treasure bag.
Destroyer Gun is the Shimmer transform of Electric Whip and shares its Destroyer availability.
Hive Staff is the Shimmer transform of The Small Sting and shares its Queen Bee availability.
Optic Staff EX is the Shimmer transform of Gemini Glaives and shares its Abominationn-tier availability.
The official Patreon player hook can drop this accessory on player death without a boss progression requirement.
The official source defines The Destroyer as a summon-damage whip that explicitly accepts melee prefixes, so both detected class affinities are intentional.
The recipe requires Bone Arrows and a Crystal Ball, making it post-Skeletron.
The recipe requires Meteor Shot, available after the world-evil boss in this profile.
These recipes use Cyborg rockets, Shroomite-derived rockets, or post-Plantera venom ammunition.
The official recipes require Hallowed Bars and class emblems, placing these essences after the mechanical bosses.
Gaia armor requires the Ancient Manipulator plus Beetle, Shroomite, Spectre, and Spooky materials.
These official recipes require the post-Moon-Lord Crucible of the Cosmos and do not require a later Fargo boss energy.
These recipes require Deviating Energy and no later Fargo boss material.
These official recipes require Abomination Energy and no later Mutant material.
These final recipes require Eternal Energy from Mutant.
